abilities.name: Chainbreaker
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Legendary Freeblade
abilities.description: Once per turn, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Using Sir Hekhtur
abilities.description: When your Canis Rex model is destroyed, Sir Hekhtur is treated as a model disembarking from a destroyed TRANSPORT – set him up within 3" of your Canis Rex model before it is removed. Sir Hekhtur then uses the profile, wargear, abilities and keywords shown on this side of the card, but cannot be selected as the target of any of your Stratagems other than Core Stratagems. Your Canis Rex unit is not considered to be destroyed until Sir Hekhtur is also destroyed.

abilities.name: Impetuous Glory
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by this model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Skyfire Protocols
abilities.description: While this model is either wholly within your deployment zone or within range of an objective marker you control, its Armiger autocannons have the [ANTI-FLY 2+] ability.

abilities.name: Seasoned Noble
abilities.description: Once per phase, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model.

abilities.name: Paladin’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, its weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] and [LANCE] abilities.

abilities.name: Aggressive Assault
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack against the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Errant's Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that model and its ranged weapons have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abilities.name: Martial Pride
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Gallant's Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that model and each time that model makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Thin Their Ranks
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Warden's Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, each time an attack is allocated to that model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Punishing Salvoes
abilities.description: In your Movement phase, if this model Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, this model’s ranged weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Crusader's Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Code
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mentor (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, improve that model’s Leadership characteristic by 1 and improve that model’s Objective Control characteristic by 2.

abilities.name: Ion Aegis (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ARMIGER model is within 6" of this model, that ARMIGER models has the Benefits of Cover.

abilities.name: Titan Hunter
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a MONSTER or VEHICLE model, re-roll a Damage roll of 1.

abilities.name: Ion Aegis (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ARMIGER model is within 6" of this model, that ARMIGER models has the Benefits of Cover.

abilities.name: Overwhelming Firestorm
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by this model this phase. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

weapons.name: Karacnos mortar battery
weapons.keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Blast, Ignores Cover, Indirect Fire

abilities.name: Sunderer of Fortresses
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a VEHICLE, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a FORTIFICATION, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead.

abilities.name: Bastion of Firepower
abilities.description: Each time this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Shock Charge
abilities.description: You can target this model with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Lancer’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Storm of Bolts
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this model is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Castigator’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, its ranged weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability and the Armour Penetration characteristic of its ranged weapons is improved by 1.

abilities.name: Searing Flames
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Acheron flame cannon. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Cerastus Knight Acheron
abilities.description: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks only.

abilities.name: Acheron’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, at the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result when they do.

abilities.name: Macro-extinction Protocols
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is TITANIC or TOWERING, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (5+)
abilities.description: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Atrapos’ Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes an attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING model, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Repair Auto-simulacra
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Magaera’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, ranged weapons equipped by that model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Grav-pinned
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if an enemy INFANTRY unit was hit by one or more of those attacks made with a graviton crusher, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is grav-pinned. While a unit is grav-pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Styrix’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.description: While a model is affected by this ability, ranged weapons equipped by that model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Protection Protocols
abilities.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.
